name: claude-code-litellm
description: LiteLLM budget status in the VS Code status bar

claudeCodeLitellm.binaryPath.markdownDescription: Path to the `claude-code-litellm-plugin` binary. If empty, the extension resolves it from `PATH`, then falls back to common install locations (`~/.local/bin`, `/usr/local/bin`).

claudeCodeLitellm.proxyUrl.markdownDescription: LiteLLM proxy URL. If set, overrides the `LITELLM_PROXY_URL` / `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL` environment variables when spawning the binary.

claudeCodeLitellm.apiKey.markdownDescription: LiteLLM API key. If set, overrides the `LITELLM_PROXY_API_KEY` / `ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN` environment variables when spawning the binary.

claudeCodeLitellm.refreshSeconds.markdownDescription: Seconds between status bar refreshes. Minimum 5.

claudeCodeLitellm.showCost.markdownDescription: Show dollar amounts ($spend/$budget) in the status bar instead of just the percentage.

claudeCodeLitellm.prefix.markdownDescription: Custom status bar prefix. If empty, the binary derives one from the Claude Code model name (or `LiteLLM:`).
